harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.product_distinguishing_contract: multi-lane cases include mixed-sign i8 products and products outside int8 range so the oracle distinguishes true widening product-reduction from add-only, mul-only/no-seed, non-widening, and wrong sign-extension behavior
harness.product_reduction_contract: signed i8*i8 products widen to an i16 intermediate and feed an i16-to-i32 standalone reduce-add with an i32 scalar seed
harness.scalar_result_contract: only out[0] is written and tail/non-scalar output slots preserve sentinels
harness.source_pattern_contract: two signed int8 source patterns are executed for every runtime count and source/accumulator buffers are preserved

compile.command: ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 rvv 'sh -lc '"'"'cd /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_wpra-hw_widening_product_reduce_add && printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'remote_arch='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' && uname -m && printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'clang_path='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' && command -v clang && printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'clang_version='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' && clang --version | head -n 1 && clang -O2 -march=rv64gcv -mabi=lp64d -I. /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_wpra-hw_widening_product_reduce_add/rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widening_product_reduce_add_harness.c /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_wpra-hw_widening_product_reduce_add/artifact-0-riscv-elf-relocatable-object-rvv-generic-typed-body-emitc-route-family.o -o /tmp/tianchenrv_rvv_generated_bundle_abi_wpra-hw_widening_product_reduce_add/rvv_generated_bundle_abi_widening_product_reduce_add_harness'"'"''

runtime_avl_vl_boundary.source: selected runtime ABI n -> tcrv_rvv.setvl -> RVV provider route facts -> emitted loop setvl -> artifact ABI

artifact_abi.prototype: void tcrv_emitc_explicit_selected_body_product_reduce_kernel_explicit_selected_body_rvv_product_reduce(const int8_t *lhs, const int8_t *rhs, const int32_t *acc, int32_t *out, size_t n);

widening_product_reduction_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv low-precision product-reduction body/config/runtime facts
widening_product_reduction_boundary.empty_count_behavior: runtime loop skipped after seed store; tail/non-scalar output sentinels preserved
widening_product_reduction_boundary.source: typed tcrv_rvv.widening_product + standalone_reduce body/config/runtime facts -> contraction route-family plan -> target-owned product-reduction validator -> neutral EmitC materializer -> generated RVV C artifact
target_validator_consumed_facts: route operand binding plan and exact binding summary
i8 source / i16 product / i32 result dtype chain
setvl/VL control and scalar store VL
required headers and C type mapping
stale dot or non-family fact rejection
